apiExceptCode.F10038: Unable to retrieve the account role. It has been set to "Standard user" by default

cpNotPermission.allNotPermissionTips: You need permission to perform this action!
cpNotPermission.title: Error

migration.noSpace: The available volume capacity is insufficient
migration.processError: Unable to migrate for user folder occupied by other processes
migration.ingText: Unable to view or modify content of the folder during migration.

supplement.chooseEmptyFile: The selected file cannot be empty or the root directory!

historyMigration.describe: For folders with version retention enabled, creation and backup of new file versions will not be affected.It may take a long time, please wait.

deleteOperation.deleteContent: After permanent deletion, this file and its past versions cannot be recovered.

guide.compatibilityTips: Versions of “File Version Explorer” and “Sync & Backup” are incompatible. Please update “Sync & Backup”.
guide.settingTip: Personal folders/shared folders with sync tasks will automatically enable version retention.{learnMoreTip}
guide.tip2: Each file modification can be recorded quickly for easy file historical versions retracing.
guide.tip3: For files replaced by sync task, previous versions can be found quickly.
guide.tip4: Document change history can be tracked in collaborative work.
guide.title: Welcome to the new "Version Explorer"

closeVersion.content:
Warning:

1. Once disabled, the system will not retain any historical versions of this folder and files deleted accidentally will not be restored.

2. The historical versions of existing files will be also deleted.
closeVersion.title: Disable version control for "{name}"

openVersion.content: Insufficient volume capacity for the folder. Please free up the space and retry.
openVersion.noSpaceTips: Insufficient volume capacity. Unable to generate versions for some files. Please free up the space and retry.

settingQuantity.ext4Tips: Tips: The volume of the current folder is using ext4 file system, and version generation will occupy large space.
settingQuantity.reduceVersionPrompt: After reducing the number of retained versions, the system will delete additional old versions. Do you want to set?

table.userFolderIsClosed: The personal folder of “{userName}” has been closed. Please enable it and perform version control operations.
table.historyMigration: Processing historical data for compatibility... Please retry later.
table.repairingByServer: Service error, generation of some file versions failed. Repairing...

versionHistory.copySuccessToTheDirectory: Copied to the directory where the file is located
